import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Button } from 'reactstrap'; const Form = () => { const [state, setState] = useState({ parameter : "", unit: "", standard: "", types: "" }) const {parameter, unit, standard, types} = state; const handleSubmit = (values) => { // e.preventDefault(); alert(values); } const handleInputChange = (values) => { let { name, value } = values.target; setState({...state, [name]: value}); } return (
handleSubmit(values)}>
) } export default Form
